problem: Healthcare facilities and other shift-based businesses struggle with employee scheduling, time tracking, and team communication, leading to coverage gaps, labor inefficiencies, and staff turnover.
solution: When I Work provides a mobile-first workforce management platform combining employee scheduling, time and attendance tracking, and team messaging. Features include AI-powered auto-scheduling, labor forecasting, GPS clock-ins, shift swapping, and integrations with major payroll providers to streamline operations for shift-based teams.
